recommendations.title: Lawrence of Arabia
recommendations.overview: During World War I, English officer Thomas Edward 'T.E.' Lawrence sets out to unite and lead the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes to fight the Turks.

recommendations.title: Zulu Dawn
recommendations.overview: In 1879, the British suffer a great loss at the Battle of Isandlwana due to incompetent leadership.

recommendations.title: Barefoot Gen
recommendations.overview: A story about the effect of the atomic bombing of Hiroshima on a boy's life and the lives of the Japanese people.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Gold
recommendations.overview: Spanish soldiers battle indigenous tribes and their own brutal natures as they search for a legendary city built of gold.

recommendations.title: The Imitation Game
recommendations.overview: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Britain's top-secret Government Code and Cypher School at Bletchley Park, dur

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: War and Peace
recommendations.overview: The love story of young Countess Natasha Rostova and Count Pierre Bezukhov is interwoven with the Great Patriotic War of 1812 against Napoleon's invading army.
